name: grantor-administration-combined
description: Optional combined Railway service: runs monday-rivhit-bridge and monday-subitems-sheet behind one HTTP port. Each app stays self-contained; launch.js only spawns the processes and routes by path prefix. Per-subdir deploys still work independently — this file does not affect them.

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix monday-rivhit-bridge install && npm --prefix monday-subitems-sheet install
